checks.name: Application boots with 110 controls and consistent v1.8.0 identity
Single-System mode remains the default and modular controls are hidden
Versioned portfolio foundation creates one stable anchor module
Valid parent-child module relationship is accepted
Guided migration preview opens before any conversion
Confirmed conversion enables modular portfolio mode
Conversion creates a complete local rollback snapshot
Converted backup preserves one anchor module and modular operating mode
Foundation conversion does not infer child requirement implementation
Shared-service module can be created through the accessible UI
New module retains the selected parent identifier
Complete portfolio foundation export shape can be imported
Rollback restores the pre-conversion Single-System workspace
A v1.7.1 backup migrates to v1.8.0 without forcing portfolio mode
